final_prompt.prompt:
Create a PPT cover slide for a domestic China fundraising roadshow announcing GPT 5.5, featuring speaker Sam Altman.

Style/medium: needs a China VC roadshow aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be PPT cover slide layout with title area and speaker attribution
Subject: must include Sam Altman as the featured speaker
Scene/backdrop: needs a professional China tech/finance roadshow atmosphere — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a confident, high-stakes pitch atmosphere — exact lighting treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a GP-appropriate professional direction — exact color values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT 5.5" and "奥特曼" (speaker name)
Constraints: must align with China domestic roadshow conventions and GP fund aesthetics
Avoid: must avoid Silicon Valley-style casual visuals, must avoid Western-centric design cliches
